podman \
  build \
  --build-arg=kube_version=v1.36.1 \
  --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.36.1 \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  -f \
  ./images/cluster/Dockerfile \
  .
podman \
  push \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.36.1
podman \
  build \
  --build-arg=kube_version=v1.35.5 \
  --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.35.5 \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  -f \
  ./images/cluster/Dockerfile \
  .
podman \
  push \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.35.5
podman \
  build \
  --build-arg=kube_version=v1.34.8 \
  --tag=image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.8 \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  -f \
  ./images/cluster/Dockerfile \
  .
podman \
  push \
  --platform=linux/amd64 \
  --platform=linux/arm64 \
  image-prefix/cluster:staging-prefix-<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.8
